title: Time in the Sun
writer: Franz Blom, Anita Brenner, Paul Burnford
actors: Ponce Espino, Charles Frederick Lindsley, William Royle
plot: For the most part, this film by Marie Seton, is a series of scenes , depicting Mexican natives in picturesque rituals, ceremonies and rites. It was edited from 110,000 feet of negative film shot in Mexico by Sergei M. Eisentein fo...
